basic_details.job_title: SVP NPA Tuition Teacher Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel National Police Academy (SVP NPA)
basic_details.short_information: Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel National Police Academy (SVP NPA) Tuition Teacher (Mathematics) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of SVP NPA. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the SVP NPA Tuition Teacher (Mathematics) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: Not specified Age Relaxation: Not specified

qualification.education_qualification: Graduation in B.Sc (PCM) or BA Mathematics (Hons) with 50% marks, B.Ed with Mathematics 55% marks, Desirable: M.Sc/M.A (Maths)/MCA, Minimum 2 years teaching experience
qualification.details: Tuition Teacher (Mathematics): Graduation in Bachelor of Science (PCM) or Bachelor of Arts (Mathematics Honours) with at least 50% marks in the desired subject. Additionally, Bachelor of Education (B.Ed.) with Mathematics as a subject, securing at least 55% marks in the subject and degree. Desirable qualifications include a Master's degree (M.Sc. in Mathematics, M.A. in Maths, or MCA) and a minimum of 2 years of teaching experience in a school or tuition center.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for the Tuition Teacher post?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Tuition Teacher (Mathematics) post is scheduled for 03 June 2026. Candidates should report on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Tuition Teacher (Mathematics) position?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Graduation in B.Sc (PCM) or BA Mathematics (Hons) with 50% marks, and B.Ed with Mathematics 55% marks. M.Sc/M.A (Maths)/MCA and 2 years of teaching experience are desirable.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement for this post is 21 years. There is no specified maximum age limit in the provided data.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Tuition Teacher (Mathematics) post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 15,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for General/OBC and SC/ST categories for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Tuition Teacher (Mathematics) role?
faq.answer: The selection process for this position will be based on a Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: Q7. Where is the Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel National Police Academy located?
faq.answer: The Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel National Police Academy is located in Hyderabad, Telangana, with the pincode 500052.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You should carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, and experience certificates.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job opportunity at the Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel National Police Academy.

faq.question: Q10. How many vacancies are available for the Tuition Teacher (Mathematics) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Tuition Teacher (Mathematics) post.
